[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Repo-class policy follow-up: scoped agent PAT escalation path filed in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/296
  
  Details:
  Closed out the repo-class guardrails thread: filed the deferred GitHub-side enforcement design as a pending entry in agentic_ai_context/OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md. The entry captures the residual gap (any agent holding the broad TRUESIGHT_DAO_AUTOPILOT PAT could bypass Sophia's tool-level guards via raw git on a fleet box or a future tool missing the check), the ready-to-execute design (fine-grained PAT with Contents read/write on code repos but read-only on the 13 API-only data repos and the three *_prod forks; rotate onto the Sophia box; broad PAT retreats to operator-only; ~1-2h), the operator decision to defer (low likelihood, guardrail-if-observed), and explicit triggers to act (observed guard bypass or onboarding a second autonomous agent with GitHub write access). This makes the escalation path durable so future sessions neither re-litigate the deferral nor mistake it for an oversight. PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/296
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
